address: Central old-town side near the Nan River, Phitsanulok
opening_hours: Temple access should be treated as active religious space; recheck locally if exact hours matter

description.en: The strongest secondary temple because it stays inside the same compact old-core heritage block.
description.nl: De sterkste secundaire tempel omdat die binnen hetzelfde compacte erfgoedblok van de oude kern blijft.

metaDescription.en: Why Wat Ratchaburana is the best secondary temple in the Phitsanulok old-core sequence.
metaDescription.nl: Waarom Wat Ratchaburana de beste secundaire tempel is in de oude kern van Phitsanulok.

enhanced_description:
Wat Ratchaburana is the temple that keeps the Phitsanulok old core from flattening into a one-site visit. It belongs directly after Wat Yai because it stays inside the same historic zone and gives the city more texture without forcing another long move.

That is the right scale for it. This is not the place to over-explain with fragile legend or price claims. It works because it strengthens the old-town route and keeps the Nan River side visible as part of the city's religious geography.
detailed_history: TAT still maintains Wat Ratchaburana as an official attraction listing, and its older Phitsanulok itinerary material keeps the temple in the same city-core heritage sequence as Wat Yai and Wat Nang Phaya.
visitor_experience: Expect a shorter temple stop than Wat Yai, but one that adds historical depth and keeps the core route coherent.

practical_info.how_to_get_there: Best reached as part of the same old-core walk after Wat Yai.
practical_info.nearby_attractions: Wat Phra Si Rattana Mahathat, Wat Nang Phaya, and the Nan River side.
practical_info.food_options: Easy to pair with a central lunch or an evening river-side plan.
practical_info.shopping: Keep the stop focused on the temple and surrounding historic quarter.

insider_tips: Do not isolate this from Wat Yai; it is stronger as part of the same route.
Use this stop to slow the pace rather than to add more distance.
The temple is more useful for city context than for spectacle.
verified_note: Source-backed summary based on current official TAT attraction coverage and TAT's Phitsanulok itinerary material.
cultural_significance: Wat Ratchaburana matters because it reinforces the old river-side temple sequence that gives Phitsanulok its historic city-core identity.
